content: Your team spends 80% on data plumbing and 20% on decisions. Agents flip that ratio. 🧵 on AI Agents for CFOs —
Here's the problem 👇 Marketing expense was $180K above budget. This was due to increased spending on digital campaigns.
The shift: You can survive a bad quarter on the P&L. You cannot survive running out of cash.
The number that matters: Real-time variance detection is $250K-$1M in annual cash driven straight to the bottom line.
What actually changes: Sixty days and $810 per month. That is the real cost of your first finance agent.

Why it compounds: A 2026 FP&A Trends survey found that while AI is now "standard practice" in leading finance teams, cultural resistance remains the primary blocker — not technology. One practitioner noted: "Acceptance can still be a challenge because of nat

The part executives miss: Manufacturing AI adoption reached 77% in 2024 (up from 70% in 2023), while professional services leads all sectors in generative AI adoption at 71%. More than four in five CFOs say AI adoption in FP&A is important. The question is no longer
This is AI Agents for CFOs, Book 1 of "Agentic AI Playbooks for Executives." Get the full playbook on Amazon — search "AI Agents for CFOs Mangum."
